name: id
description: The ID of the code component.

name: text
description: If `html` is set, this is not required. Text for the code element. If `html` is provided, the `text` option will be ignored.

name: html
description: If `text` is set, this is not required. HTML for the code element. If `html` is provided, the `text` option will be ignored.

name: classes
description: Classes to add to the code container.

name: attributes
description: HTML attributes (for example data attributes) to add to the code container.

name: copyButtonClassList
description: Classes to add to the button. Default is `["nhsuk-button--secondary", "nhsuk-button--small"]`.

name: copyButtonText
description: Button text before the code is copied to clipboard. Defaults to `"Copy code"`.

name: copiedButtonText
description: Button text when the code is copied to clipboard. Defaults to `"Code copied"`.

name: copiedAnnouncementText
description: Announcement made to screen reader users when the code is copied to clipboard. Defaults to `"Code copied to clipboard"`.

name: button
description: Optional object allowing customisation of the copy button.

params.name: classes
params.description: Classes to add to the button.

name: background
description: Optional background colour for the code element – `"body"` or `"template"`.

name: border
description: If set to `false`, remove border from the code container.
